title: German Chancellor, After Iran Spat With Trump, Reports ‘Good’ Phone Call
summary_full: The call, initiated by Friedrich Merz, came soon after he told young people, “I am a great admirer of America. My admiration is not increasing at the moment.”
summary_public: The call, initiated by Friedrich Merz, came soon after he told young people, “I am a great admirer of America. My admiration is not increasing at the moment.”
